keyFeatures.zh: 互动且引人入胜的演示文稿

description.en: Create and share presentations with up to 100MB file size and no watermarks.
description.zh: 创建并分享演示文稿，文件大小最多100MB，无水印

description.en: Includes all free features plus advanced collaboration tools, unlimited file size, and no watermarks.
description.zh: 包含所有免费功能，以及高级协作工具，无限制文件大小，无水印

weaknesses.en: Some advanced features require Pro plan
weaknesses.zh: 一些高级功能需要专业版

targetAudience.en: Presenters, educators, and professionals who need to create and share engaging presentations.
targetAudience.zh: 需要创建并分享引人入胜演示文稿的演讲者、教育工作者和专业人士

positioning.en: Prezi is a cloud-based presentation tool that focuses on creativity and engagement, offering advanced collaboration features for team projects.
positioning.zh: Prezi是一款基于云的演示工具，专注于创意和互动性，提供高级协作功能以支持团队项目
